Her parents got divorced when she was young due to her father cheating on her mother. Her father is no longer in the picture, her immediate family being her mother and her aunt Cheryl. She is the leader of the school book club naturally. She gets fairly overwhelmed because her status as the principal's daughter makes her a prime target for manipulation.
